title: Context, Cancellation, Backpressure, Structured Concurrency, and Leaks · Language Lens: Goroutine Leak Diagnosis
summary: A request launches several operations; one fails, one blocks, one outlives the caller, and overload grows without bound. Planned artifact: Add and verify the go goroutine leak diagnosis increment in a cancelable bounded worker group. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Detect leaked goroutines with ownership traces, cancellation tests, profiles, and changed failure cases.
Bound queues and concurrency, choose block, reject, shed, or degrade behavior, and measure saturation.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
